description: Create a channel named 'Pharmacy_Message_Normalizer' to normalize malformed HL7 messages from a legacy system that sends Unix-style newlines (LF) and trailing whitespace. The channel must receive HL7 v2.x data via a TCP Listener on port 6661, use a preprocessor to replace all '\n' characters with '\r' and trim trailing whitespace from the raw message string, and write the output to /tmp/normalized_messages/ using the filename pattern 'output_${date:yyyyMMddHHmmss}.hl7'. Verify the configuration by processing the test message from /home/ga/test_message.hl7 through the listener port.
